word: G1507 - εἱλίσσω - heilíssō - hi-lis'-so - Roll together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἱλίσσω

- Transliteration: heilisso

- Phonetic: hi-lis'-so

- Definition:

1. to roll up or together

- Origin: a prolonged form of a primary but defective verb heilo (of the same meaning)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: A prolonged form of a primary but defective verb εἵλω heilō (of the same meaning); to coil or wrap: - roll together. See also G1667.
